data.title: Write RED tests for trailer injection via git interpret-trailers
data.description: Extend tests/unit/scripts/test-apply-attribution-trailers.sh with three failing tests: test_injection_appends_dso_agent_trailer_to_commit_message() (populated JSONL + commit-msg file -> after script runs, commit-msg contains 'DSO-Agent:' line), test_two_distinct_agents_produce_two_dso_agent_lines() (SC-3: 2 distinct subagent_type values -> exactly 2 '^DSO-Agent:' lines in output), test_injection_emits_trailer_skipped_and_exits_0_when_git_below_2_6() (GIT_BINARY mocked to return version 1.9.0 -> stderr contains TRAILER_SKIPPED, exit code 0, commit-msg unchanged). Use GIT_BINARY mock pattern from T6-test. All 3 tests fail (RED). TDD exemption: test-writing task.
